headline: Is It Time To Reassess Lennar (LEN) After Its Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether Lennar's current share price offers value or just reflects sentiment, the recent performance gives you a useful starting point. The stock closed at US$86.20, with returns of a 6.6% decline over 7 days, a 0.3% decline over 30 days, a 17.3% decline year to date and a 17.3% decline over the last year. The 3 year and 5 year returns are 14.6% and 2.7% declines respectively. These moves have kept Lennar on many investors' watchlists, as they reassess how the current...
